name: Chicken, Green Bean and Goat Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds green beans, trimmed and halved crosswise
2 1/2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar
ornamental kale or red leaf lettuce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Arrange chicken breasts in a single layer in jelly roll pans or baking pans.
3. Brush both sides with soy sauce and olive oil. Sprinkle both sides with pepper.
4. Arrange skin side up and roast until just cooked through, about 20 minutes.
5. Cool slightly. Remove skin and bones; reserve drippings in pans.
6. Cut chicken into 1/2-inch-wide strips. Return to pans and turn to coat with drippings.
7. Cool. Transfer chicken meat and drippings to a large bowl. Set aside.
8. Cook beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
9. Drain. Refresh with cold water. Drain well. (Can be prepared 1 day ahead. Cover chicken and beans separately and refrigerate.)
10. Combine mustard and vinegar in a medium bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. Add shallots and 2 tablespoons thyme.
11. Season salad with salt and pepper. Line platter with kale.
12. Top with salad and sprinkle with cheese and additional thyme. Serve.
